Responsibilities.Item: Maintain source manifests and import logs for reference data.
Reject user decisions as evidence for normative FSNB fields or official KSI codes.
Create structured questions when required evidence is missing.

Invariants.Item: Files in inbox are not trusted until accepted into raw with checksum.

Responsibilities.Item: Represent each imported source version as reference_release.
Represent stable logical records as reference_object.
Create reference_object_revision only when canonical payload hash changes, or records are added/deleted.
Create reference_change_set and reference_change_detail entries for added, changed, deleted, and unchanged records.

Invariants.Item: Allowed operations are add, update, delete.
Allowed change types are added, changed, deleted, unchanged.

Responsibilities.Item: Store draft and candidate matching rules with explicit evidence slots.
Prevent active status when required evidence is missing.
Track dependencies on reference objects and revisions.
Move rules to requires_norm_review when depended normative reference revisions change.

Invariants.Item: ModelElement must not map directly to GESNNorm.
KSIResultCode must not directly select GESNNorm.
GESNNorm must not create ScheduleTask directly.
